code-dev-safety-preflight-ALIAS alias stub — superseded by code-dev-safety-preflight; removed next release.
code-dev-pr-ready Pre-push gate — branch verify + preflight + output push command (HUMAN runs push)
code-dev-safety Safety umbrella — freeze / thaw / dont-do / preflight / audit (PR-14)
health-check Verify every tool in REGISTRY.json — auto-iterates, no hardcoded list
rag-maturity-audit Standalone RAG maturity audit model — scores AXON retrieval, grounding, and agentic-RAG readiness
code-dev-safety-preflight Gates 0–10 pre-push validation. NEVER executes builds/linters — surfaces them as HUMAN actions.
code-dev-pr-review PR review mode — context load → study → conflict analysis → harmonize → rebase → execute → verify → commit → document

compile-optimizer Systematically scan all AXON programs, compile high-value targets, verify each one passes test+simulate, and enforce the delegation principle — programs must reuse existing tools and compiled programs rather than re-inventing them
